title: Bombs by Juix
description: Datapack adding a few unique & custom TNTs
body:
# ℹ️ Bombs By Juix The Bombs pack adds some unique TNT-like explosives, varying in power, and with special abilities. Hurry up and go blow them up in your bro's base ! 💥

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4048360cb981a6e0c22a1b1b3a6bea54dbf75bd.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.4] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.7+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) Here are all the Bombs you can craft :
## Dynamite & Lit TNT - **Dynamite** : Lets you throw a TNT-like explosive projectile - **Lit TNT** : A simple TNT already ignited when placed
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f9277207363755ebf0341c4b623f1756b45d31e.png) ## Bomb & Dangerous Bomb - **Bomb** : Smaller than a TNT, Explosion Power of ~3 - **Dangerous Bomb** : Bigger than a TNT, Explosion Power of ~7
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19e36d11b7947a5c938365322bf47225f5e366f9.png) ## Toxic Bomb - **Toxic Bomb** : Explosion Power of ~3, but it makes the surrounding area infected and unbreathable
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86e3a615b96605b40a09676917515882b8a3229b.png) ## Atomic Bomb - **Atomic Bomb** : A small bomb that can have big consequences. Explosion Power of ~20, try it for yourself. Beware of radioactivity !
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8467fd8310217535862ac94b1391c8f2d60eee50.png)
# 🆕 Options - **_/function bbs_data:summon/bomb_** - **_/function bbs_data:summon/dangerous_bomb_** - **_/function bbs_data:summon/toxic_bomb_** - **_/function bbs_data:summon/atomic_bomb_**

It lets you place my bombs via commands, for your minigames for example ! (v1.2+)

- **_/function datapack:bombs_datapack/change_bombs_power_** | Are my bombs too boring ? Boost (x1.5) or Hyper boost (x2) the explosion power of Bombs (v1.2+) !
[**Normal**] VS [**Boosted**] VS [**Hyper boosted**] Bomb :

![compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a114236c050bdb0f4d08142e5b70d0be5035903.webp)
# 🪳 Known issues - No known issue for now Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
